Let me introduce myself

I'm Adam Krueger,
UX and Product Designer

With over 20 years of experience spanning design, strategy, and leadership, I help teams build products that hold up at scale. I've led global teams, bridged design and engineering, and mentored designers at every level, always thinking beyond flows and features to the systems and decisions that shape how a product evolves.

I care about craft, but I care more about coherence. The goal isn't just to ship something good, it's to raise the quality bar in a way that lasts

Featured Work

View all

SAAS · Design Systems

Eco Future (v2.0)

A streamlined, modern design system built to scale across sector-specific products and accelerate development.

Energy · SAAS Platform

Fuel Intelligence Hub

Intelligence platform that helps fuel suppliers optimize supply, pricing, and customer performance, driving customer retention and opening new revenue opportunities in the energy sector.

HealthTech · Service Design

Patient Intake Experience

Mapped end-to-end service touchpoints to improve completion and reduce administrative overhead.
